payload.author: Bri
payload.body: Fix applied: loadRelationEdges no longer fans out across a withTaskGroup capturing the non-Sendable HubClient — it fetches sequentially, which removes both the Swift-6 Sendable diagnostic and the concurrent-use data race. NOTE: code-complete but UNVERIFIED here (no Xcode build); compile + Swift-6 strict-concurrency check tracked in SCP-164.
